name: webnovel-writer
description: Long-form Chinese webnovel creation system for Codex, adapted from the Claude Code plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Chinese long-form webnovel planning, writing, review, memory, and dashboard workflows.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-adapted local plugin for long-form Chinese webnovel creation. It preserves the original Webnovel Writer skills, agents, scripts, templates, references, RAG helpers, story-state pipeline, and read-only dashboard, while adding Codex-specific environment guidance. Original project: lingfengQAQ/webnovel-writer.
defaultPrompt: 用 Webnovel Writer 初始化一本新网文。
用 Webnovel Writer 规划第 1 卷。
用 Webnovel Writer 审查最近章节。
